channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 sales top eight million
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Latest milestone achieved one year after release.

Total sales for turn-based RPG Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 have surpassed eight million units, publisher Kepler Interactive and developer Sandfall Interactive announced on the game’s first anniversary today.

Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on April 24, 2025. It is also available via Game Pass.

The game sold 500,000 units just one day after its release, one million units within three days, two million units in unde two weeks, and 3.3 million units 33 days after release.

Sandfall Interactive has also released a free minor game update on all platforms that includes a new Anniversary haircut for each playable character. To access the new haircuts, players must purchase them from Gestral merchants in the game world. The update also includes minor bug fixes and enhancements.

Here is an overview of the game, via Kepler Interactive:

About

Lead the members of Expedition 33 on their quest to destroy the Paintress so that she can never paint death again. Explore a world of wonders inspired by Belle Époque France and battle unique enemies in this turn-based RPG with real-time mechanics.

Year by Year, She Erases Us

Once a year, the Paintress wakes and paints upon her monolith. Paints her cursed number. And everyone of that age turns to smoke and fades away. Year by year, that number ticks down and more of us are erased. Tomorrow she’ll wake and paint “33.” And tomorrow we depart on our final mission: Destroy the Paintress, so she can never paint death again. We are Expedition 33.

Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 is a ground-breaking turn-based RPG with unique real-time mechanics, making battles more immersive and addictive than ever. Explore a fantasy world inspired by Belle Époque France in which you battle devastating enemies.

Reactive Turn-Based Combat

In this evolution of JRPGs, real-time actions enhance the heart of turn-based combat. Craft unique builds for your Expeditioners that fit your playstyle via gear, stats, skills, and character synergies. Open an active dimension in combat—dodge, parry, and counter in real time, chain combos by mastering attack rhythms, and target enemy weak points using a free aim system.

Tomorrow Comes

With only one year left to live, join Gustave, Maelle, and their fellow Expeditioners as they embark upon a desperate quest to break the Paintress’ cycle of death. Follow the trail of previous expeditions and discover their fate. Get to know the members of Expedition 33 as they learn to work together against impossible odds.

A Hauntingly Beautiful World

Explore an enchanting realm populated by surreal adversaries. Wander through breathtaking landscapes, from the Island of Visages to the Forgotten Battlefield, discovering secrets and hidden quests along the way. Find allies of fortune in creatures of legend and recruit special companions, access new travel methods and discover secret areas in the World Map.

Experience the debut game from Sandfall Interactive, fully realized in Unreal Engine 5 with stunning graphics and a heartbreaking soundtrack.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/clair-obscur-expedition-33-sales-top-eight-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Zenless Zone Zero version 2.8 update ‘New: Eridan Sunset’ launches May 6; Steam version coming soon
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone
  • Xbox Series

Season 2 approaches its finale.

The version 2.8 update for Zenless Zone Zero, dubbed “New: Eridan Sunset,” will launch on May 6, developer miHoYo announced. A Steam version of the game was also announced as coming “in the near future” with cross-platform data compatibility.

Here is an overview of the update, via miHoYo:

In this new version, the executioner of Krampus, Promeia, and the upgraded Cunning Hares member Starlight – Billy will enter the fray, bringing new variables to the turmoil of the Outer Ring. The update also introduces an ethereal outfit for Hoshimi Miyabi, a new Wind attribute enemy to the battlefield, and multiple system optimizations.

As the last chapter of Season 2, this version introduces the story in which the mysterious target Ramiel becomes the focus of pursuit for various factions in the Outer Ring. Meanwhile, Promeia, the executioner of Krampus, appears as an intelligence contact, forming a temporary alliance with the upgraded Starlight – Billy, the Proxies, and Cissia to uncover Ramiel’s true identity and intentions. As the investigation deepens, the Proxies will encounter an unexpected twist—one that brings both risk and opportunity, potentially transforming into a new power that they can harness in the future.

As the executioner of Krampus, Promeia is an S-Rank Ice Anomaly agent who excels at triggering Abloom on enemies by consuming Trial by Cold, which can be obtained by converting Corrosive Chill. Her EX Special Attack activates the Bound Absolution state, allowing her to automatically trigger a Perfect Dodge when attacked. When the squad includes another Anomaly or Support agent, she can also boost the squad’s Abloom damage.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Starlight – Billy, an S-Rank Physical Rupture agent, is Billy’s fully upgraded form, funded by half a year of his salary paid in advance. Armed with a combat motorcycle and his signature Starlight Knight flying kick, he delivers massive Physical burst damage. Starlight – Billy increases his Sheer damage based on his maximum Health, and the Physical damage dealt by all his attacks is considered Sheer damage. Additionally, some of Starlight – Billy’s skills can restore his own Health. Starlight Billy’s Ultimate unleashes his signature powerful kick, dealing a large amount of damage to enemies. Both agents will debut in Version 2.8, alongside reruns of Lucia (Ether – Support) and Orphie & Magus (Fire – Attack).

The new version also introduces a brand-new attribute enemy and a new Vortex combat mechanic: When certain enemies are inflicted with the Wind Attribute Anomaly, applying other Attribute Anomalies will trigger Vortex instead of Disorder, dealing AoE Anomaly damage matching the corresponding element. This adds fresh strategic layers to team building. On new version events, “Marcel Bootopia” lets players control Eous to explore a Bangboo resort island temporarily closed due to an accompanying Hollow, rescuing trapped Bangboos and collecting treasures. Completing the event rewards Proxies with Booltergeist and its Bangboo core. This A-Rank Bangboo can hover in the air and fire lasers in combat, dealing increased damage when specific teammates are present. Other events include the “Ultimate Verdict Trial” where Proxies can fight alongside Promeia, as well as many other activities with their respective Polychrome rewards. The new outfit featuring the classic style of the Hoshimi family, Hoshimi Miyabi: Dignified Blossom, will also be available in the shop after the new version update. As for system optimizations, there will be a new Polychrome Guide feature that helps track limited-time rewards progress. Resource and storage management has also been optimized, with a new auto-delete function introduced.

Additionally, the Zenless Zone Zero original soundtrack vinyl sets will be available for pre-order via the Laced Records store starting April 29. This vinyl set includes classic in-game tracks and character themes from Zenless Zone Zero, presenting the game’s soundtrack to players in a beautifully crafted physical format.

Zenless Zone Zero is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PC via client download and Epic Games Store, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play.

Watch a new set of trailers and the version 2.8 special program below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Version 2.8 Update “New: Eridan Sunset” Trailer

Traditional Chinese
